languages.text: Из глубины веков всплыло имя Себериана фон Валанциуса, Вольного Торговца, о котором не сохранилось ни единого упоминания в династических архивах. Лорду-капитану предстоит узнать, какие ужасные тайны или бесценные сокровища оставил после себя загадочный предок.

traits.locale_text: Из глубины веков всплыло имя Себериана фон Валанциуса, Вольного Торговца, о котором не сохранилось ни единого упоминания в династических архивах. Лорду-капитану предстоит узнать, какие ужасные тайны или бесценные сокровища оставил после себя загадочный предок.

languages.text: From the depths of time the name Seberian von Valancius has resurfaced, a Rogue Trader of whom no mention survives within the dynastic archives. The Lord Captain must discover what terrible secrets or priceless treasures this enigmatic ancestor left behind.
languages.original_text: Из глубины веков всплыло имя Себериана фон Валанциуса, Вольного Торговца, о котором не сохранилось ни единого упоминания в династических архивах. Лорду-капитану предстоит узнать, какие ужасные тайны или бесценные сокровища оставил после себя загадочный предок.

traits.locale_text: From the depths of centuries, the name of Seberian von Valancius has resurfaced, a Rogue Trader of whom no mention survives within the dynastic archives. The Lord Captain must discover what terrible secrets or priceless treasures this enigmatic ancestor left behind.

From the depths of time the name Seberian von Valancius has resurfaced, a Rogue Trader of whom no mention survives within the dynastic archives. The Lord Captain must discover what terrible secrets or priceless treasures this enigmatic ancestor left behind.

The von Valancius dynasty has an ancient and glorious history, one that has seen its rises and falls. The Lord Captain found references to one legendary head of the dynasty, Seberian, who disappeared at the dawn of the protectorate somewhere in the Koronus Expanse.

The von Valancius dynasty has an ancient and glorious history, one that has seen its rises and falls. The Lord Captain found references to one legendary head of the dynasty, Seberian, who disappeared at the dawn of the protectorate somewhere in the Koronus Expanse — along with several valuable artefacts.

From the depths of centuries, the name of Seberian von Valancius has resurfaced, a Rogue Trader of whom no mention survives within the dynastic archives. The Lord Captain must discover what terrible secrets or priceless treasures this enigmatic ancestor left behind.

From the depths of time the name Seberian von Valancius has resurfaced, a Rogue Trader of whom no mention survives within the dynastic archives. The Lord Captain must discover what terrible secrets or priceless treasures this enigmatic ancestor left behind.

languages.text: ヴァランシウス家は古く栄えた歴史を持つ家系で、その栄光と衰退を繰り返してきました。そして、守護領の誕生の頃、コーロナス広域に存在するどこかで姿を消したという伝説の首領、セベリアンについての記述を見つけました。
languages.original_text: The von Valancius dynasty has an ancient and glorious history, one that has seen its rises and falls. The Lord Captain found references to one legendary head of the dynasty, Seberian, who disappeared at the dawn of the protectorate somewhere in the Koronus Expanse.

traits.locale_text: ヴァランシウス家は古く栄えた歴史を持つ家系で、その栄光と衰退を繰り返してきました。そして、守護領の誕生の頃、コーロナス広域に存在するどこかで姿を消したという伝説の首領、セベリアンについての記述を見つけました。

languages.text: Desde lo más recóndito del tiempo surge el nombre de Seberian von Valancius, un Comerciante Independiente del que no queda mención alguna en los archivos de la dinastía. {mf|El|La} Lord Capitán debe descubrir qué terribles secretos y fantásticos tesoros dejó atrás su misterioso antepasado.
languages.original_text: From the depths of time the name Seberian von Valancius has resurfaced, a Rogue Trader of whom no mention survives within the dynastic archives. The Lord Captain must discover what terrible secrets or priceless treasures this enigmatic ancestor left behind.

traits.locale_text: Desde lo más recóndito del tiempo surge el nombre de Seberian von Valancius, un Comerciante Independiente del que no queda mención alguna en los archivos de la dinastía. {mf|El|La} Lord Capitán debe descubrir qué terribles secretos y fantásticos tesoros dejó atrás su misterioso antepasado.

languages.text: Aus den Tiefen der Zeit wurde der Name Seberian von Valancius angeschwemmt, ein Freihändler, der in den Archiven der Dynastie mit keinem Wort erwähnt wird. Der Lord Captain muss herausfinden, welche schrecklichen Geheimnisse oder kostbaren Schätze dieser geheimnisvolle Ahnherr zurückgelassen hat.
languages.original_text: From the depths of time the name Seberian von Valancius has resurfaced, a Rogue Trader of whom no mention survives within the dynastic archives. The Lord Captain must discover what terrible secrets or priceless treasures this enigmatic ancestor left behind.

traits.locale_text: Aus den Tiefen der Zeit wurde der Name Seberian von Valancius angeschwemmt, ein Freihändler, der in den Archiven der Dynastie mit keinem Wort erwähnt wird. Der Lord Captain muss herausfinden, welche schrecklichen Geheimnisse oder kostbaren Schätze dieser geheimnisvolle Ahnherr zurückgelassen hat.

languages.text: Le nom du libre-marchand Seberian von Valancius, qui n'est mentionné dans aucune archive de la dynastie, a soudain ressurgi des profondeurs du temps. {mf|Le seigneur-capitaine|La seigneure-capitaine} doit découvrir quels terribles secrets ou trésors inestimables cet énigmatique ancêtre a bien pu laisser derrière lui.
languages.original_text: From the depths of time the name Seberian von Valancius has resurfaced, a Rogue Trader of whom no mention survives within the dynastic archives. The Lord Captain must discover what terrible secrets or priceless treasures this enigmatic ancestor left behind.

traits.locale_text: Le nom du libre-marchand Seberian von Valancius, qui n'est mentionné dans aucune archive de la dynastie, a soudain ressurgi des profondeurs du temps. {mf|Le seigneur-capitaine|La seigneure-capitaine} doit découvrir quels terribles secrets ou trésors inestimables cet énigmatique ancêtre a bien pu laisser derrière lui.

languages.text: 穿越漫长岁月，塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯这个名字重新浮现。可王朝档案里却没有任何关于这位行商浪人的记载。舰长大人必须查明，这位神秘的先祖究竟是留下了可怕的秘密，还是无价的遗产。
languages.original_text: From the depths of time the name Seberian von Valancius has resurfaced, a Rogue Trader of whom no mention survives within the dynastic archives. The Lord Captain must discover what terrible secrets or priceless treasures this enigmatic ancestor left behind.

traits.locale_text: 穿越漫长岁月，塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯这个名字重新浮现。可王朝档案里却没有任何关于这位行商浪人的记载。舰长大人必须查明，这位神秘的先祖究竟是留下了可怕的秘密，还是无价的遗产。

languages.text: Hanedan arşivlerinde hakkında hiçbir kayıt bulunmayan Hür Tacir Seberian von Valancius'un adı, zamanın derinliklerinden yeniden su yüzüne çıktı. Lord Kaptan, bu esrarengiz atanın arkasında hangi korkunç sırları veya paha biçilmez hazineleri bıraktığını keşfetmeli.
languages.original_text: From the depths of time the name Seberian von Valancius has resurfaced, a Rogue Trader of whom no mention survives within the dynastic archives. The Lord Captain must discover what terrible secrets or priceless treasures this enigmatic ancestor left behind.
